title: Knowledge Assistant is now available in more regions
body:
Knowledge Assistant is now available in the following AWS regions: `us-east-2`, `ca-central-1`, `eu-central-1`, `eu-west-1`, `ap-southeast-1` (requires [cross-geo processing](/aws/en/resources/databricks-geos#cross-geo-processing)), and `ap-southeast-2` (requires [cross-geo processing](/aws/en/resources/databricks-geos#cross-geo-processing)).

Users in these regions can now use Knowledge Assistant to create a production-grade AI agent that can answer questions about their documents and provide high-quality responses with citations.

See [Use Knowledge Assistant to create a high-quality chatbot over your documents](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/knowledge-assistant).

ref_links.text: Use Knowledge Assistant to create a high-quality chatbot over your documents
